sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44531" key="eu)neikh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐνεικής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n44531.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to decide</tr_>, of a suit: hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easy to interpret</tr_>, of an oracle, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0239.tlg002:75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
